SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class FIFOStrategy

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.FIFOStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Strategy<Goal>, Named, Feature
public class FIFOStrategy extends Object implements Strategy<Goal>
Trivial implementation of the Strategy interface that uses only the goal time to determine the cost of a RuleApp.

  • Field Details

    • INSTANCE

      public static final Strategy<Goal> INSTANCE

  • Method Details

    • computeCost

      public <Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>> RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal, MutableState mState)
      Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
      Specified by:
      computeCost in interface Feature
      Returns:
      the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).

    • isApprovedApp

      public boolean isApprovedApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal)
      Re-Evaluate a RuleApp. This method is called immediately before a rule is really applied
      Specified by:
      isApprovedApp in interface Strategy<Goal>
      Returns:
      true iff the rule should be applied, false otherwise

    • instantiateApp

      public void instantiateApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal, RuleAppCostCollector collector)
      Description copied from interface: Strategy
      Instantiate an incomplete RuleApp. This method is called when the AutomatedRuleApplicationManager comes across a rule application in which some schema variables are not yet instantiated, or which is in some other way incomplete. The strategy then has the opportunity to return/provide a list of (more) complete rule applications by feeding them into the provided RuleAppCostCollector.
      Specified by:
      instantiateApp in interface Strategy<Goal>

    • name

      public Name name()
      Specified by:
      name in interface Named

    • isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal

      public boolean isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal()
      Description copied from interface: Strategy
      Checks if the Strategy should stop at the first non-closeable Strategy.
      Specified by:
      isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal in interface Strategy<Goal>
      Returns:
      true stop, false continue on other Strategys.
